title: Air Tactical Arsenal
description: Adds Shahed-136 UAV, Iskander-M ballistic missile, Orlan-10 recon drone, air defense radar and alert sirens to Minecraft 1.20.1.
body:
# Air Tactical Arsenal

A Forge 1.20.1 mod that brings tactical strike systems into Minecraft: kamikaze drones, ballistic missiles, recon UAVs, an air defense radar, and alert sirens. Made for the **KrutEvent** server.

## Strike systems

### Shahed-136
Kamikaze UAV. Launch from a mobile platform via a control terminal. Two attack profiles — low dive and high dive — let you adapt to terrain and target.

### Iskander-M
Ballistic missile. Requires a 5×5 launch pad with open sky. After a 7-second prep countdown, the rocket arcs high above the world and dives onto your selected coordinates.

### Orlan-10
Recon drone with its own FPV camera and night vision shader. Plan routes from the control tablet and watch the battlefield from above.

## Control & detection

- **Shahed Control Terminal** — input X/Z coordinates, see cost, fire
- **Iskander Control Terminal** — unified launcher manager, supports several pads, shows ETA and pad status
- **Air Defense Radar** — tactical map with zoom, pan, and target markers
- **Launch Interface Cable** — links a launcher to its terminal (up to 60 blocks)
- **Alert Siren** — alarm block for incoming-strike warnings

## Other features

- Chunk-aware flight — flight paths force-load chunks so missiles never despawn mid-air
- Coin currency for launches with per-player balance
- Whitelist / blacklist for controlling who can launch
- Paint Stand and Spray Can for repainting your gear
- GeckoLib animations and custom sounds
- Live config tweaks via `/shahed config`
- English and Russian translations

## Compatibility

- **TacZ** (optional) — shoot down Shaheds with TacZ firearms
- **Superb Warfare** (optional) — extra weapon integration
- **Create** (optional) — ATA blocks are protected from Create contraptions

## Requirements

- Minecraft 1.20.1
- Forge 47+
- GeckoLib 4.4+

## Source code

Available on GitHub — see the project links.

## License

Custom license. Personal use and non-commercial servers are allowed. Commercial use requires written permission. Full terms in the LICENSE file in the source repository.
